category_sources: source_facts.description says pager program similar to more; official Greenwood Software FAQ says less is a pager for displaying text files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is less; official Greenwood Software site uses less.
docs_sources: Official Greenwood Software less homepage and FAQ are the primary official documentation surfaces available online.
repo_sources: Official Greenwood Software pages direct bug reports/issues to github.com/gwsw/less; source_facts.source-archive comes from the official Greenwood Software distribution rather than a repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official FAQ describes less as a command-line pager.
